equivalence_argument: No complete mapping: WaitForPending no longer races the empty payload future, but the Earliest fallback grace window required by the invariant is absent.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The port prevents WaitForPending empty-payload racing but does not implement the configured grace delay for Earliest fallback, so the full invariant is not enforced.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/payload/basic/src/lib.rs filters empty_payload out when kind == PayloadKind::WaitForPending.
crates/payload/primitives/src/lib.rs documents WaitForPending does not race an empty payload job.
The same RaceEmptyPayload branch immediately spawns build_empty_payload and there is no empty_payload_grace configuration.

notes: This is a partial mapping recorded as a gap because the invariant requires both behaviors.
rationale: The primary diff adds builder.empty-payload-grace with a 200ms default, stores it in the payload job, avoids empty fallback spawning for WaitForPending, and sleeps for the grace duration before building race_empty_payload for Earliest. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When resolving payloads, WaitForPending should not spawn an empty-payload fallback race, and Earliest fallback should wait the configured empty_payload_grace duration before building an empty payload so an in-flight full build remains preferred during the grace window.
suggested_falsification_tests: Start a payload build that will finish shortly after an Earliest request and assert an empty fallback is not produced before empty_payload_grace elapses. Then issue a WaitForPending request while a full build is in flight and assert no empty fallback race is spawned; the result should wait for or prefer the in-flight full payload.
summary: WaitForPending avoids empty fallback, but Earliest grace is missing.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Issue Earliest/RaceEmptyPayload while a full build is about to finish and assert empty fallback is delayed by configured grace; current source has no delay.
title: Empty payload fallback does not race WaitForPending full builds
